creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

There's few issues with your submission that are causing it to not to be accepted (wrong port name, used PORTREVISION, wrong maintainer addres, whitespaces/tabs mixup and so on). Please, consult with Porters Handbook and `portlint` tool to improve the patch and submit it on reviews.freebsd.org for review first, so that we could work on it.
